channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [VENUSREM] Venus Remedies: Social Media Disclosure on Physical Share Transfer
item.description:
Venus Remedies Ltd. has disclosed social media posts regarding the notice to shareholders about the special window for re-lodgement of physical share transfer requests. This disclosure is pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The posts were made on the company's official Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X accounts, referencing SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026 dated 30.01.2026.

  • Venus Remedies discloses social media posts on physical share transfer.
  • Disclosure is under SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements.
  • Posts are on Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X.
  • Notice relates to re-lodgement of physical share transfer requests.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VENUS REMEDIES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [JUSTO] Justo Realfintech Secures ₹1,100 Cr New Sales Mandates
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Justo Realfintech Ltd has secured new sales mandates aggregating to over ₹1,100 crore across residential and commercial projects in Mumbai and Pune. This brings the cumulative value of mandates secured since listing to approximately ₹4,647 crore, and the aggregate value of mandates currently under execution to approximately ₹6,272 crore. The new mandates involve projects by developers including Malpani Estates and Sneha Constructions, comprising approximately 900 units and over 7.7 lakh square feet of saleable area. Since listing, the company’s executable mandate portfolio has increased by approximately 50%.

  • Justo Realfintech secures new sales mandates exceeding ₹1,100 crore.
  • Cumulative mandates since listing reach approximately ₹4,647 crore.
  • Total mandates under execution stand at approximately ₹6,272 crore.
  • New mandates cover 900 units across 7.7 lakh sq ft saleable area.
  • Executable mandate portfolio increased by approximately 50% since listing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Justo Realfintech Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HEROMOTOCO] Hero MotoCorp Appoints Sachin Agrawal as CTO
item.description:
Hero MotoCorp Ltd. has appointed Sachin Agrawal as Chief Technology Officer (CTO), effective May 21, 2026. Agrawal will lead the company's R&D transformation across the Hero Centre for Innovation and Technology (CIT) and the Hero Tech Centre Germany (TCG). Vikram Kasbekar will step down as CTO but will continue as Executive Director. Agrawal brings 29 years of experience in automotive R&D and technology leadership, previously serving as Executive Vice President & Head – R&D and Technology at VE Commercial Vehicles.

  • Sachin Agrawal appointed as Chief Technology Officer (CTO) of Hero MotoCorp, effective May 21, 2026.
  • Vikram Kasbekar to step down as CTO but will remain as Executive Director.
  • Agrawal will lead R&D transformation and next-generation mobility initiatives.
  • Agrawal has 29 years of experience in automotive R&D and technology leadership.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HERO MOTOCORP LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [LAXMIMACH] LMW Ltd Board Meeting on 20/05/2026 to Approve Audited Financial Results
item.description:
LMW Ltd has announced a meeting of its Board of Directors scheduled for May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results of the company for the quarter and period ended March 31, 2026. The trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, to May 22, 2026. The notice of the board meeting is available on the company's website.

  • LMW Ltd's board will meet on May 20, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and period ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window is closed from April 1 to May 22, 2026.
  • Notice of the board meeting is posted on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LAKSHMI MACHINE WORKS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SAHYADRI] Sahyadri Industries Signs Share Subscription Agreement
item.description:
Sahyadri Industries Ltd has signed a Share Subscription and Shareholders' Agreement (SSSHA) on May 4, 2026, with a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) and the Parent Company. This agreement pertains to the acquisition of 7.14% equity in Emerge Solar One Private Limited for purchasing solar power under a group captive scheme, as per the Electricity Act, 2003.

  • Sahyadri Industries signs Share Subscription and Shareholders' Agreement.
  • Agreement relates to 7.14% equity acquisition in Emerge Solar One Private Limited.
  • Acquisition is for solar power purchase under a group captive scheme.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAHYADRI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [VTL] Vardhman Textiles Board Meeting on May 7, 2026
item.description:
Vardhman Textiles Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 7, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and to recommend a dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Dividend recommendation for FY26 to be discussed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN TEXTILES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BHEL] BHEL Recommends ₹1.40 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) has announced its audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹1.40 per share (70% of the paid-up share capital) for FY 2025-26. The decision was made during the Board of Directors meeting held on May 4, 2026. The dividend, if approved at the Annual General Meeting, will be paid within 30 days.

  • BHEL's Board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • A final dividend of ₹1.40 per share was recommended for FY 2025-26.
  • The dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting.
  • Meeting for results and dividend commenced at 10:05 AM and concluded at 11:05 AM on May 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT HEAVY ELECTRICALS LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [JTLIND] JTL Industries Gets ACRS Certification for Steel Hollow Sections
item.description:
🔥 Trending

JTL Industries Ltd has received Product Conformity Certification from the Australasian Certification Authority for Reinforcing and Structural Steels (ACRS), becoming the only Indian company to achieve this for structural hollow sections. The certification, applicable to its Mangaon facility in Maharashtra, covers cold-formed structural steel hollow sections compliant with AS/NZS 1163:2016 and related standards. This allows JTL to supply to high-specification infrastructure projects in Australia and New Zealand and strengthens its global presence. JTL has also commenced supplying DFT pipes to the US market.

  • JTL Industries receives ACRS certification for structural hollow sections.
  • JTL is the only Indian company with this certification for structural hollow sections.
  • The certification allows JTL to supply to infrastructure projects in Australia and New Zealand.
  • JTL has commenced supplying DFT pipes to the United States market.
  • The ACRS certification strengthens the global acceptance of JTL's DFT structural product portfolio.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JTL Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KPEL] K.P. Energy Board Meeting Scheduled for May 7, 2026
item.description:
K.P. Energy Ltd has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for May 7, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window closure period will end 48 hours after the results are made public, as per SEBI regulations.

  • Board meeting to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY26.
  • Trading window closure to end 48 hours post result announcement.
  • Meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: K.P. Energy Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BHEL] BHEL Recommends ₹1.40 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) has approved its audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹1.40 per share (70% of paid-up share capital) for FY 2025-26. The dividend, if declared at the Annual General Meeting, will be paid within 30 days. The board meeting commenced at 9.48 AM and concluded at 11.05 AM, with the agenda regarding financial results and dividend starting at 10.05 AM.

  • BHEL approves FY26 audited financial results.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.40 per share recommended for FY26.
  • Dividend payout is 70% of the paid-up share capital.
  • AGM dividend payment within 30 days of declaration.
  • Board meeting concluded at 11.05 AM on May 4, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT HEAVY ELECTRICALS LTD. | Category: Dividend
